title: Self-folding single cell grippers.
author: Malachowski K Jamal M Jin Q Polat B Morris CJ Gracias DH
content: S-EPMC4096189 PMC4096189 Self-folding single cell grippers. Given the heterogeneous nature of cultures, tumors, and tissues, the ability to capture, contain, and analyze single cells is important for genomics, proteomics, diagnostics, therapeutics, and surgery.
